headline: Jim Cramer on First Solar: “This Stock’s Just Been Overlooked, I Think It’s Too Cheap”
summary: First Solar, Inc. (NASDAQ:FSLR) was among the stocks Jim Cramer discussed on Mad Money as he addressed investors’ recent overblown worries and growth stocks stuck in bear-market territory. Cramer highlighted the company’s low valuation, as he stated: Finally, there’s First Solar, the solar panel maker that’s down nearly 30% from its peak set last December, […]

headline: First Solar, Inc. to Announce First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on April 30, 2026
summary: PHOENIX, April 16, 2026--First Solar, Inc. (NASDAQ: FSLR) (the "Company") will report financial results for the first quarter ended March 31, 2026, after the market closes on Thursday, April 30, 2026.
